page: Microsoft Azure M416s_v2 is a memory-optimized server belonging to the MSv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 416 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 208 physical Intel Xeon 8280L cores with hyper-threading enabled, operating at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The x86_64 architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and AVX512_VNNI. The server is equipped with an extensive 5700.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 13.7 GB of RAM per vCPU, and includes 8389 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. No GPUs are present on this instance.

Benchmark data highlights a significant contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance is positioned in the bottom 25%, and the Geekbench single-core score is in the middle 50%. Conversely, the multi-core stress-ng benchmark achieves top-tier status, placing in the top 10% with a score of 376443.61. Geekbench multi-core and image processing scores sit in the average range, while software compilation via Clang is strong, and ray tracing benchmarks reach the top 10%.

Given the massive memory footprint and high core count, this server represents a high-density resource profile. The qualitative cost efficiency is optimized for workloads that require massive in-memory datasets rather than raw single-threaded CPU speed, where the lower single-core performance presents a clear tradeoff. It is highly suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise SAP HANA deployments, and heavy multi-threaded data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure M416s_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSv2 family, powered by 416 dedicated vCPUs on 208 physical Intel Xeon 8280L cores running at 2.7 GHz. It features a massive 5700.0 GB of RAM alongside 8389 GB of local storage with Premium Storage support. While single-core benchmarks show lower-tier performance, its multi-core capabilities are exceptional, with stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench ray tracing scores ranking in the top 10%. This server is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, making it highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, SAP HANA, and heavy multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416s_v2 is a memory-optimized server featuring 416 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 5700 GB of RAM, and 8389 GB of local storage, designed for massive in-memory database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M416s_v2 is a memory-optimized server with 416 Intel vCPUs, 5700 GB RAM, and 8389 GB local storage for enterprise databases.
tagline: A massive memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 5.7 TB of RAM and 416 dedicated vCPUs for enterprise in-memory workloads.
bullet_points: Features 416 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8280L processors
Equipped with 5700 GB of RAM and 8389 GB of local storage
Top-tier multi-core performance in stress-ng and ray tracing benchmarks
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and SAP HANA deployments
Supports Premium Storage and advanced AVX-512 instruction sets
